# Polycrisis risk read - KEN

*Cross-SDG composite from 7 authoritative headline indicators. Generated by CEDAR - every figure cited below.*

## Headline: high stress - 5 of 7 SDG fronts off-track or worsening

| Domain | Indicator | Latest | Benchmark | Status | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Child survival | Under-5 mortality rate | 39.6 per 1,000 live births | 25 | [!] off-track | High |
| Nutrition | Stunting prevalence (under-5) | 17.6 % of children under 5 | (trend) | [+] improving | Low |
| Maternal health | Maternal mortality ratio | 149 per 100,000 live births | 70 | [!] off-track | High |
| Poverty | Poverty rate ($3.00/day, 2021 PPP) | 45.5 % of population | 3 | [!] off-track | Low |
| Education | Primary completion rate | 102.2 % of relevant age group | 100 | [OK] on-track | Low |
| Water | Basic drinking-water coverage | 64.8 % of population | 100 | [!] off-track | High |
| Energy access | Access to electricity | 76.2 % of population | 100 | [!] off-track | High |

## Caveats

- Stunting prevalence (under-5): Sparse series: only 3 of 10 years carry a value (survey-dependent indicator). Treat year-on-year movement with caution.
- Poverty rate ($3.00/day, 2021 PPP): Sparse series: only 5 of 18 years carry a value (survey-dependent indicator). Treat year-on-year movement with caution.
- Primary completion rate: Sparse series: only 4 of 12 years carry a value (survey-dependent indicator). Treat year-on-year movement with caution.
- Primary completion rate: Latest available data point is 2016; figures may lag current conditions.

## Methods & reproducibility

One headline indicator per SDG domain. 'Off-track' = latest value misses the published SDG benchmark; where no fixed benchmark exists, status reflects the trend (first vs latest). All figures pulled from authoritative APIs; no figure is model-generated.

## Evidence ledger

| Domain | Indicator | Source (lineage) | Query |
|---|---|---|---|
| Child survival | SH.DYN.MORT | UN IGME (UN Inter-agency Group for Child Mortality Estimation, led by UNICEF/WHO/UN DESA/World Bank) | [link](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/KEN/indicator/SH.DYN.MORT?format=json&date=2010:2023) |
| Nutrition | SH.STA.STNT.ZS | UNICEF/WHO/World Bank Joint Child Malnutrition Estimates (JME) | [link](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/KEN/indicator/SH.STA.STNT.ZS?format=json&date=2014:2023) |
| Maternal health | SH.STA.MMRT | WHO/UN MMEIG -> WDI | [link](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/KEN/indicator/SH.STA.MMRT?format=json&date=2010:2023) |
| Poverty | SI.POV.DDAY | World Bank PIP -> WDI | [link](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/KEN/indicator/SI.POV.DDAY?format=json&date=2010:2023) |
| Education | SE.PRM.CMPT.ZS | UNESCO UIS -> WDI | [link](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/KEN/indicator/SE.PRM.CMPT.ZS?format=json&date=2010:2023) |
| Water | SH.H2O.BASW.ZS | WHO/UNICEF JMP -> WDI | [link](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/KEN/indicator/SH.H2O.BASW.ZS?format=json&date=2010:2023) |
| Energy access | EG.ELC.ACCS.ZS | World Bank/IEA Tracking SDG7 -> WDI | [link](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/KEN/indicator/EG.ELC.ACCS.ZS?format=json&date=2010:2023) |
